member.name: T:Geocoding.Address
member.summary: Most basic and generic form of address. Just the full address string and a lat/long

member.name: M:Geocoding.Address.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new address instance for deserialization.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Address.#ctor(System.String,Geocoding.Location,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new address instance.
member.param: The provider name that produced this address.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Address.FormattedAddress
member.summary: Gets or sets the full formatted address.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Address.Coordinates
member.summary: Gets or sets the latitude and longitude for this address.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Address.Provider
member.summary: Gets the provider name for this address.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Address.DistanceBetween(Geocoding.Address)
member.summary: Calculates the distance from this address to another address in miles.
member.returns: The distance between the two addresses.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Address.DistanceBetween(Geocoding.Address,Geocoding.DistanceUnits)
member.summary: Calculates the distance from this address to another address.
member.param: The unit to return the distance in.
member.returns: The distance between the two addresses.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Address.ToString
member.summary: Returns the formatted address.

member.name: T:Geocoding.Bounds
member.summary: Represents a rectangular viewport defined by southwest and northeast coordinates.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Bounds.SouthWest
member.summary: Gets the southwest corner.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Bounds.NorthEast
member.summary: Gets the northeast corner.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Bounds.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes bounds from raw latitude and longitude values.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Bounds.#ctor(Geocoding.Location,Geocoding.Location)
member.summary: Initializes bounds from two corner locations.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Bounds.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current bounds.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Bounds.Equals(Geocoding.Bounds)
member.summary: Determines whether another bounds instance is equal to the current one.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Bounds.GetHashCode
member.summary: Returns a hash code for the current bounds.
member.returns: A hash code for the current bounds.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Bounds.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the bounds.
member.returns: A string representation of the bounds.

member.name: T:Geocoding.Distance
member.summary: Represents a distance value and its units.

member.name: F:Geocoding.Distance.EarthRadiusInMiles
member.summary: Radius of earth in miles.

member.name: F:Geocoding.Distance.EarthRadiusInKilometers
member.summary: Radius of earth in kilometers.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Distance.Value
member.summary: Gets the numeric distance value.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Distance.Units
member.summary: Gets the units of the distance value.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Distance.#ctor(System.Double,Geocoding.DistanceUnits)
member.summary: Initializes a new distance.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Distance.FromMiles(System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a distance from miles.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Distance.FromKilometers(System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a distance from kilometers.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Distance.ToMiles
member.summary: Converts this value to miles.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Distance.ToKilometers
member.summary: Converts this value to kilometers.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Distance.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to this distance.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Distance.Equals(Geocoding.Distance)
member.summary: Determines whether another distance is equal to this distance.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Distance.Equals(Geocoding.Distance,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Determines whether another distance is equal, with optional unit normalization.
member.param: If true, converts the compared value to this instance units first.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Distance.GetHashCode
member.summary: Returns a hash code for this distance.
member.returns: A hash code for this distance.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Distance.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of this distance.
member.returns: A string representation of this distance.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Distance.op_Multiply(Geocoding.Distance,System.Double)
member.summary: Multiplies a distance by a scalar.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Distance.op_Addition(Geocoding.Distance,Geocoding.Distance)
member.summary: Adds two distances.
member.returns: The summed distance in left units.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Distance.op_Subtraction(Geocoding.Distance,Geocoding.Distance)
member.summary: Subtracts one distance from another.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Distance.op_Equality(Geocoding.Distance,Geocoding.Distance)
member.summary: Compares two distances for equality.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Distance.op_Inequality(Geocoding.Distance,Geocoding.Distance)
member.summary: Compares two distances for inequality.
member.returns: true when not equal; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Distance.op_LessThan(Geocoding.Distance,Geocoding.Distance)
member.summary: Determines whether the left distance is less than the right distance.
member.returns: true when left is less than right; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Distance.op_LessThanOrEqual(Geocoding.Distance,Geocoding.Distance)
member.summary: Determines whether the left distance is less than or equal to the right distance.
member.returns: true when left is less than or equal to right; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Distance.op_GreaterThan(Geocoding.Distance,Geocoding.Distance)
member.summary: Determines whether the left distance is greater than the right distance.
member.returns: true when left is greater than right; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Distance.op_GreaterThanOrEqual(Geocoding.Distance,Geocoding.Distance)
member.summary: Determines whether the left distance is greater than or equal to the right distance.
member.returns: true when left is greater than or equal to right; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Distance.op_Implicit(Geocoding.Distance)~System.Double
member.summary: Converts a distance to its numeric value.

member.name: T:Geocoding.DistanceUnits
member.summary: Distance units supported by the library.

member.name: F:Geocoding.DistanceUnits.Miles
member.summary: Statute miles.

member.name: F:Geocoding.DistanceUnits.Kilometers
member.summary: Kilometers.

member.name: T:Geocoding.Extensions.CollectionExtensions
member.summary: Collection-related helpers.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Extensions.CollectionExtensions.IsNullOrEmpty``1(System.Collections.Generic.ICollection{``0})
member.summary: Returns whether a collection is null or has no items.
member.returns: true when the collection is null or empty.

member.name: T:Geocoding.Extensions.EnumerableExtensions
member.summary: Enumerable-related helpers.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Extensions.EnumerableExtensions.ForEach``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Action{``0})
member.summary: Executes an action for each item in an enumerable.
member.param: The action to execute for each item.

member.name: T:Geocoding.Extensions.JsonExtensions
member.summary: JSON serialization helpers and shared serializer options.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Extensions.JsonExtensions.JsonOptions
member.summary: Shared serialization options used across geocoding providers.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Extensions.JsonExtensions.ToJson(System.Object)
member.summary: Serializes an object to JSON.
member.returns: The JSON payload, or an empty string when the input is null.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Extensions.JsonExtensions.FromJson``1(System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes JSON into a strongly typed instance.
member.returns: A deserialized instance, or default value for blank input.

member.name: T:Geocoding.Core.GeocodingException
member.summary: Base exception used for geocoding failures.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Core.GeocodingException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new geocoding exception.

member.name: T:Geocoding.IBatchGeocoder
member.summary: Defines batch geocoding operations.

member.name: M:Geocoding.IBatchGeocoder.GeocodeAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Geocodes a batch of addresses.
member.returns: A result item per input address.

member.name: M:Geocoding.IBatchGeocoder.ReverseGeocodeAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Geocoding.Location},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reverse geocodes a batch of coordinates.
member.returns: A result item per input location.

member.name: T:Geocoding.IGeocoder
member.summary: Defines geocoding and reverse geocoding operations.

member.name: M:Geocoding.IGeocoder.GeocodeAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Geocodes a single formatted address string.

member.name: M:Geocoding.IGeocoder.GeocodeAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Geocodes an address from component parts.

member.name: M:Geocoding.IGeocoder.ReverseGeocodeAsync(Geocoding.Location,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reverse geocodes from a location object.

member.name: M:Geocoding.IGeocoder.ReverseGeocodeAsync(System.Double,System.Double,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reverse geocodes from latitude and longitude.

member.name: T:Geocoding.Location
member.summary: Represents a geographic coordinate.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Location.Latitude
member.summary: Gets or sets the latitude in decimal degrees.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Location.Longitude
member.summary: Gets or sets the longitude in decimal degrees.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Location.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a default location at 0,0.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Location.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a location with latitude and longitude.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Location.ToRadian(System.Double)
member.summary: Converts degrees to radians.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Location.DistanceBetween(Geocoding.Location)
member.summary: Calculates distance to another location in miles.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Location.DistanceBetween(Geocoding.Location,Geocoding.DistanceUnits)
member.summary: Calculates distance to another location.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Location.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to this location.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Location.Equals(Geocoding.Location)
member.summary: Determines whether another location is equal to this location.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Location.GetHashCode
member.summary: Returns a hash code for this location.
member.returns: A hash code for this location.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Location.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the location.
member.returns: A string representation of the location.

member.name: T:Geocoding.ParsedAddress
member.summary: Generic parsed address with each field separated out form the original FormattedAddress

member.name: P:Geocoding.ParsedAddress.Street
member.summary: Gets or sets the street portion.

member.name: P:Geocoding.ParsedAddress.City
member.summary: Gets or sets the city portion.

member.name: P:Geocoding.ParsedAddress.County
member.summary: Gets or sets the county portion.

member.name: P:Geocoding.ParsedAddress.State
member.summary: Gets or sets the state or region portion.

member.name: P:Geocoding.ParsedAddress.Country
member.summary: Gets or sets the country portion.

member.name: P:Geocoding.ParsedAddress.PostCode
member.summary: Gets or sets the postal or zip code portion.

member.name: M:Geocoding.ParsedAddress.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a parsed address for deserialization.

member.name: M:Geocoding.ParsedAddress.#ctor(System.String,Geocoding.Location,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a parsed address.

member.name: T:Geocoding.ResultItem
member.summary: Represents a single batch request item and its response values.

member.name: P:Geocoding.ResultItem.Request
member.summary: Original input for this response

member.name: P:Geocoding.ResultItem.Response
member.summary: Output for the given input

member.name: M:Geocoding.ResultItem.#ctor(Geocoding.Address,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Geocoding.Address})
member.summary: Initializes a new result item.

member.name: T:Geocoding.Serialization.TolerantStringEnumConverterFactory
member.summary: A that deserializes enum values tolerantly, returning an Unknown enum member when one exists, or the default value otherwise. This prevents deserialization failures when a geocoding API returns new enum values that the library doesn't yet know about while still preserving nullable-enum behavior.
